name: Potato Time
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potato slices in a covered vegetable steamer and steam for 12 minutes. Drain and cool.
2. Mix together mayonnaise, onion, soy sauce, oregano, garlic powder, and parsley.
3. Frost each potato slice with the mixture, then dip it into cracker crumbs.
4. Bake on cookie sheets at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes.
5. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over the potatoes and serve hot.
To make as a casserole:
1. Cover the bottom of a baking dish with potato slices.
2. Spread mayonnaise mixture evenly over the potatoes.
3. Sprinkle cracker crumbs on top, then repeat layers until all ingredients are used.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour.
5. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over the casserole and serve.
